sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section IX, List of Answers on Terminology 73

items.sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section IX, List of Answers on Terminology 73:1
items.html:
(to the question) Nesira [sawing apart]
At the time of Katnut, the Nukva is cleaved to the Achoraim [back] of ZA, and the wall of ZA — which is the discernment of the Achoraim of ZA from the time of his Katnut — serves the Nukva as well. But through the Mochin that she attains from Ima, which bring the lower Hey down from her Eynaim, she returns her AHP to herself, and they become new NHY for her, which are made into Achoraim for her. And then ZON are sawed apart and separated from one another, for she has Achoraim of her own. (Items 13 and 92)
